name: Webeyez
excerpt: Webeyez is a real-time Customer Journey Analytics platform for eCommerce teams. Product Analytics, Session Replay, AI-driven funnel analysis, and revenue-quantified alerts that turn silent friction into ranked, dev-ready fixes.
content:
Webeyez is a real-time Customer Journey Analytics platform built for eCommerce teams. It helps brands detect, prioritize, and resolve customer-experience roadblocks across the online funnel. Combining Product Analytics, Session Replay, AI-driven funnel analysis, and revenue-quantified alerts, Webeyez turns silent conversion friction into ranked, dev-ready fixes — helping bridge the gap between marketing, product, and development. More than 1,000 brands use it to protect revenue across the shopper journey.

Key benefits of the offering:

  • Customer Journey Analytics: Understand where shoppers struggle across the full path to purchase, from product discovery to checkout.
  • Digital and E-Commerce Analytics: Monitor funnel performance, technical issues, UX friction, and revenue-impacting events in real time.
  • Product Analytics: See how shoppers interact with key pages, features, filters, forms, promotions, and checkout flows.
  • Session Replay and visual diagnostics: See the journey through the customer's eyes and give development a reproducible case, not a guess.
  • Revenue-quantified prioritization: Every issue is tied to revenue at risk, so teams can fix what costs the most first.
  • Marketing, product, and development bridged: One shared view of what is breaking, what it costs, and what needs attention first.

Why partner together?

Webeyez instruments what happens once a shopper is on the site. Content Cucumber instruments whether buyers and AI engines find and trust the brand before they ever arrive. The two reads do not overlap, and a client needs both. Together they form one combined full-funnel audit. Content Cucumber delivers the discoverability, schema, content, and AI-citation read, Webeyez delivers the on-site friction and revenue-at-risk read, and the client gets a single picture instead of two partial ones. Co-sell is the lead shape, with reciprocal referral as the low-friction default through the Webeyez partner program.
